title: Alpha-1 Antitrypsin Deficiency
summary: Alpha-1 Antitrypsin Deficiency
detail: This genotype indicates two copies of the PiZ allele, leading to alpha-1 antitrypsin deficiency and it's clinical consequences. The consequences include high risk for emphysema (80-100% risk according to ClinGen), liver cirrhosis (15-19% risk) and chronic obstructive pulmonary disease, especially in smokers.

title: Carrier for Alpha-1 Antitrypsin Deficiency
